name: recoil_app_intro_fmv_on_try_become_current
description: RecoilApp_IntroFmvState::OnTryBecomeCurrent sets the render/Fx surfaces from the primary surface, marks the cached client rect dirty, and starts the INTRO FMV script unless intro playback is skipped.
known_limits: The caller smoke verifies the skip-intro branch surface, render-region, stride, Fx, and cached-client-rect side effects. The unskipped FMV load and BeginAtTime paths are covered by the listed zFMV script functional smokes because a cold full intro playback setup depends on archive and runtime provider state.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the RecoilApp FMV state source cluster.
